nodes.name: Transform QuoteBuilder
nodes.notes: Maps StarGTM quote financials (Quote Sheet) → stargtm calculations.package_cost / vat / grand_total

nodes.name: Write Live Enquiry Sheet
nodes.notes: LIVE writes. Ensure columns Assigned Rep / Next Action / Package Abbreviation / Viva Tag / Quote Built / Quote Approved / Quote Version exist (or map to your real headers).

nodes.name: Append Demo StarGTM Ops
nodes.notes: DEMO default. Create a tab named exactly StarGTM Ops with these headers before first run.

nodes.name: Append Progress Note Row
nodes.notes: Create tab StarGTM Ops Notes. Demo and Live both append here with Mode column; Live can later also mirror into Enquiry if desired.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json;
const mode = body.mode === 'live' ? 'live' : 'demo';
const upgrades = Array.isArray(body.selectedUpgrades)
  ? body.selectedUpgrades.join(', ')
  : (body.selectedUpgrades || '');
return [{
  json: {
    mode,
    referenceNumber: body.referenceNumber || '',
    email: body.email || '',
    leadName: body.leadName || '',
    quoteId: body.quoteId || '',
    status: body.status || '',
    version: body.version || '',
    title: body.title || '',
    eventType: body.eventType || '',
    eventDate: body.eventDate || '',
    guestCount: body.guestCount || body.guests || '',
    guests: body.guests ?? '',
    repeatClient: body.repeatClient === true ? 'YES' : (body.repeatClient === false ? 'NO' : ''),
    selectedUpgrades: upgrades,
    baseCost: body.baseCost ?? '',
    contingency: body.contingency ?? '',
    contingencyRate: body.contingencyRate ?? '',
    margin: body.margin ?? '',
    marginAmount: body.marginAmount ?? '',
    costToClient: body.costToClient ?? body.packageCost ?? '',
    packageCost: body.packageCost ?? body.costToClient ?? '',
    vat: body.vat ?? '',
    vatRate: body.vatRate ?? '',
    upgradeTotal: body.upgradeTotal ?? '',
    grandTotal: body.grandTotal ?? '',
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  }
}];

nodes.name: Append Quote Status Row
nodes.notes: Create tab StarGTM Ops Quotes with full Quote Sheet financial columns.
